The '''Silvestri Trace''' was originally a small, lightly traveled, and all together insignificant [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route, originating from [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] chose the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] as the site of construction for its [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]], the Silvestri Trace was expanded and lengthened to reach the moon. This was done via the use of non-mass [[S-thread booster/Legends|S-thread boosters]] planted in hyperspace and then by moving realspace debris along its length.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] was then renamed the [[Sanctuary Pipeline/Legends|Sanctuary Pipeline]].
